title: Working Memory, Durable Memory, Write Admission, Provenance, and Poisoning Defense · Runtime Lens: Memory Poisoning Defense
summary: The agent stores every conversation, mixes tenants, remembers injected instructions as facts, never expires data, and treats similarity as truth. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the memory poisoning defense increment in provenance-gated tenant-isolated memory service. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-ca…
objectives: Test direct, indirect, cross-session, shared-memory, stale-fact, hidden-instruction, and authority-confusion poisoning with quarantine and repair paths.
Enforce tenant and user isolation at storage, index, query, cache, logs, deletion, export, backup, and restore boundaries.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-memory-policy-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-memory-policy-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_memory_policy_2(memory_candidates: int = 30, admitted_memories: int = 12, rejected_memories: int = 18, provenance_records: int = 30, cross_tenant_leaks: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if memory_candidates < 1 or admitted_memories < 0 or rejected_memories < 0:
        return False, memory_candidates, "memory-count"
    if admitted_memories + rejected_memories != memory_candidates:
        return False, admitted_memories, "memory-reconciliation"
    if provenance_records != memory_candidates:
        return False, provenance_records, "memory-provenance"
    if cross_tenant_leaks > 0:
        return False, cross_tenant_leaks, "tenant-memory-leak"
    assert admitted_memories + rejected_memories == memory_candidates and cross_tenant_leaks == 0
    return True, admitted_memories, "provenance-gated-memory"
